full_suite.failure_notes: Exit 1. Managed-sandbox bind denials: three test_court_keypoint_review_server tests, three test_review_input_server tests, and two test_sam3dbody_persistent_worker tests. test_flight_simulator.py::test_generate_corpus_is_deterministic_and_fast_for_small_cpu_sample took 8.079s versus 5s and reproduced isolated at 7.327s; this lane did not modify flight code. test_scaffold_tool_index.py::test_real_scaffold_tool_index_matches_checked_in_schema failed because concurrent untracked build_event_head_anchor_candidates.py has unknown category. That concurrent failure is not proven pre-existing, so PASS is not claimed.

honest_issues: Random-init zero-shot transfer is zero: HIT and BOUNCE F1 are 0.0 at both tolerances. The 0.0 negative false-positive rate reflects no predictions above threshold, not useful accuracy.
The wide suite remains red, so smoke gate 6 and the overall objective are not complete.

The upstream jhong93 train/val clips straddle parent broadcasts. canonical_split is preserved, while actual train/val assignment groups entire parents deterministically; some canonical clip assignments necessarily change.
The public evaluation is only a three-window execution slice, not accuracy evidence.
ImageNet-weight loading exists and fails loudly offline, but was not exercised with downloaded weights.
The real owner-reviewed file remains absent; only the schema-exact synthetic fixture was fine-tuned.
No frame cache was created. Lane artifacts total 15 MiB and the committed-only vendor reference totals 23 MiB.
BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) no stack delta. No promotion or best_stack.json change; a future GPU checkpoint requires its own PENDING models/MANIFEST.json entry.
next: The concurrent anchor-candidate lane must register its CLI category, then the integration owner should rerun the full suite in an environment permitting socket binds and meeting the flight timing budget. Do not promote the smoke checkpoint.
